strand: Establishing and maintaining classroom routines
gapNote: No app supports designing, rehearsing or auditing the day-to-day routines (entry, transitions, materials) that underpin a calm classroom.
title: Routine Designer and Rehearsal Planner
concept: Build step-by-step routines (entry, transition, exit) with rehearsal scripts and a checklist for consistent reinforcement.

strand: High expectations and a positive classroom culture
gapNote: Nothing helps teachers articulate, communicate and track the visible behaviours that signal consistently high expectations.
title: Expectations and Norms Builder
concept: Co-construct and display classroom norms with positively framed exemplars and a self-audit of teacher language.

strand: Responding to and de-escalating low-level disruption
gapNote: No tool rehearses graduated, least-intrusive responses or helps reflect on consistency of sanctions.
title: Least-Intrusive Response Rehearser
concept: Scenario-based practice of a stepped response ladder, from non-verbal cues to formal consequence, with reflective prompts.

strand: Clear, structured explanation of new content
gapNote: No app helps teachers sequence, script or sense-check the clarity of an explanation before teaching it.
title: Explanation Sequencer
concept: Break new content into a logical sequence of small steps with worked checks for ambiguity and prior-knowledge dependencies.

strand: Worked examples and live modelling
gapNote: Nothing supports planning a worked example or narrated 'I do' that makes expert thinking visible.
title: Worked Example Planner
concept: Design faded worked examples (full model to completion problem) with a think-aloud script for the teacher narration.

strand: Dialogic talk and structured classroom discussion
gapNote: No app supports planning oracy protocols, talk roles or whole-class discussion structures.
title: Oracy and Talk Protocol Planner
concept: Plan structured discussion formats (think-pair-share, talk roles, sentence stems) with an oracy progression for the topic.
altIdeas: Cold Call and Probing Sequence Builder

strand: Spaced and interleaved practice scheduling
gapNote: Quiz generator produces questions but nothing schedules spacing or interleaving across a unit or term.
title: Spacing and Interleaving Scheduler
concept: Plot when each topic is revisited across a scheme so retrieval is distributed and interleaved rather than blocked.

strand: Securing prior knowledge before new learning
gapNote: No tool helps map and check the prerequisite knowledge a lesson assumes pupils already hold.
title: Prerequisite Knowledge Mapper
concept: Identify the prior knowledge a new topic depends on and generate a quick diagnostic to confirm it is secure.

strand: Designing valid assessments and using assessment data
gapNote: Nothing supports designing assessments aligned to the curriculum or analysing question-level performance.
title: Assessment Blueprint Builder
concept: Map assessment items to curriculum objectives and cognitive demand to check validity and coverage before sitting.

strand: High-quality teaching for disadvantaged and EAL pupils
gapNote: No app addresses targeted strategies for closing gaps for disadvantaged or EAL learners.
title: Vocabulary and EAL Support Planner
concept: Plan tiered vocabulary teaching and language scaffolds for a lesson to support EAL and disadvantaged pupils.

strand: Sequencing the curriculum and building schemes of learning
gapNote: No tool supports sequencing concepts across a unit or year so knowledge builds coherently.
title: Curriculum Sequencer
concept: Order concepts across a scheme with explicit links to prior and future learning and identified threshold concepts.

strand: Subject and pedagogical content knowledge
gapNote: Nothing helps teachers audit subject knowledge or anticipate subject-specific misconceptions.
title: Misconception Anticipation Bank
concept: Build a subject- and topic-specific bank of common pupil misconceptions with diagnostic questions and corrective moves.

strand: Reading, vocabulary and literacy across the curriculum
gapNote: No app supports planning disciplinary literacy, tier-two vocabulary or reading strategies within subjects.
title: Disciplinary Literacy Planner
concept: Plan subject-specific reading, vocabulary and writing demands for a unit with explicit teaching strategies.

strand: Reflective practice and professional development planning
gapNote: No tool helps a teacher set, track and review personal development goals across an appraisal cycle.
title: CPD Goal and Reflection Journal
concept: Set development goals against the framework, log deliberate practice and reflect on impact over time.

strand: Engaging with educational research and evidence
gapNote: Nothing curates or helps teachers interrogate the evidence base (EEF, cognitive science) for their practice.
title: Evidence Summary Explorer
concept: Browse plain-English summaries of key evidence (EEF strands, cognitive science) with classroom implications and confidence ratings.

strand: Wellbeing, workload and professional conduct
gapNote: No app supports staff wellbeing, workload self-audit or reflection against professional standards.
title: Workload Self-Audit Tool
concept: Audit where time goes against high-impact activity and identify workload reductions aligned to trust policy.

strand: EBacc entry and average point score (APS)
gapNote: No app handles EBacc entry rate, EBacc APS or the EBacc 9-1 strong/standard pass thresholds.
title: EBacc Entry and APS Dashboard
concept: Model EBacc entry rate and average point score across the five pillars, flagging pupils one subject short of qualifying.

strand: Basics measures: English and maths 9-5 and 9-4 pass rates
gapNote: No app isolates the headline Basics (strong/standard) pass measures separately from P8/A8.
title: Basics Pass-Rate Tracker
concept: Show 9-4 and 9-5 English-and-maths pass rates with disadvantage and SEND splits against national benchmarks.

strand: Benchmarking against national, LA and similar-schools averages
gapNote: No app contextualises a school's measures against national, local-authority or statistical-neighbour benchmarks.
title: National Benchmark Overlay
concept: Plot the school's headline measures against national, LA and similar-school averages with confidence intervals.

strand: Pupil Premium spend, strategy and impact alignment
gapNote: No app links Pupil Premium funding tiers (teaching, targeted, wider) to measured outcomes.
title: Pupil Premium Strategy Impact Planner
concept: Map PP spend across the EEF three-tier model and track each strand against the disadvantaged outcome it targets.

strand: Authorised vs unauthorised absence and code analysis
gapNote: No app breaks absence down by DfE attendance code (I, M, O, U etc).
title: Attendance Code Breakdown
concept: Decompose absence by statutory code to separate illness, holiday and unauthorised patterns by group.

strand: Suspensions and permanent exclusions analysis
gapNote: No app handles suspension days, repeat suspensions or permanent exclusion rates by characteristic.
title: Suspensions and Exclusions Monitor
concept: Track suspension episodes, lost days and PEX rates with disproportionality flags for disadvantaged and SEND pupils.

strand: Behaviour, sanctions and on-call data analysis
gapNote: No app analyses internal behaviour points, removals or on-call referrals.
title: Behaviour Referral Analyser
concept: Surface hotspots by time, subject, year group and pupil for behaviour points and removal-room referrals.

strand: Attendance-to-attainment correlation
gapNote: No app links attendance bands to outcome measures.
title: Attendance-Attainment Scatter
concept: Plot each pupil's attendance against P8 to quantify the cost of absence on progress.

strand: Residuals: subject vs pupil's own average
gapNote: No app computes per-subject residuals against each pupil's mean grade to find under/over-performing subjects.
title: Subject Residual Heatmap
concept: Show each subject's grade relative to the pupil's own average to expose departmental strengths and concerns.

strand: Standardisation and moderation of internal assessment
gapNote: No app supports internal marking standardisation or moderation reliability checks.
title: Moderation Reliability Checker
concept: Compare markers' scores on common scripts and flag drift, leniency and inconsistency before data entry.

strand: Grade distribution and question-level analysis (QLA)
gapNote: No app provides question-level analysis of mock or assessment papers.
title: Question-Level Analysis Grid
concept: Heatmap performance by question and topic across a class to target reteaching precisely.

strand: Cost-effectiveness and resource allocation
gapNote: No app weighs intervention cost against measured outcome gain.
title: Intervention Cost-Benefit Planner
concept: Rank interventions by cost per grade of progress using an EEF-style months-of-progress lens.

strand: Distinguishing correlation from causation in school data
gapNote: No app helps leaders avoid over-claiming causal impact from observational data.
title: Correlation vs Causation Sandbox
concept: Manipulate confounders and counterfactuals to show why a rise after an intervention is not proof it caused the rise.

strand: Navigating the IDSR and Analyse School Performance (ASP)
gapNote: No app orientates leaders to IDSR/ASP layout, significance colouring and headline gauges.
title: IDSR Walkthrough Simulator
concept: Annotated interactive replica of an IDSR explaining quintiles, significance shading and what inspectors read first.

strand: Statistical significance and confidence intervals in accountability data
gapNote: No app explains why small cohorts produce wide confidence intervals and unstable measures.
title: Confidence Interval Visualiser
concept: Slide cohort size to show how P8 confidence intervals widen and when a result is statistically significant.

strand: Governor and trust-board data reporting
gapNote: No app produces a clear, jargon-controlled governance summary from headline data.
title: Governor Data Summary Builder
concept: Turn headline measures into a one-page RAG-rated board report with plain-English commentary prompts.

strand: Data visualisation principles and avoiding misleading charts
gapNote: No app teaches honest charting (truncated axes, dual axes, cherry-picked baselines).
title: Honest Charts Lab
concept: Toggle misleading-chart tricks on and off to train leaders to spot and avoid distortion in their own reporting.

strand: Data protection, GDPR and ethical handling of pupil data
gapNote: No app addresses lawful basis, minimisation and safeguarding when sharing pupil-level data.
title: Pupil Data Ethics Checker
concept: Scenario-based tool testing lawful basis, minimisation and anonymisation decisions before data is shared.
